This repository is a template for creating new repositories in the dynatrace-oss organization.

When working in this repository:

- Keep changes simple, explicit, and easy for maintainers to update after repository creation.
- Treat the root README as a maintainer setup guide, not as end-user product documentation.
- Preserve required governance files unless a change explicitly updates the template standard.
- Prefer policy-style wording where expectations are mandatory.
- Keep examples short and easy to copy into generated repositories.
- Avoid introducing language-specific tooling unless it is broadly useful across most repositories created from this template.
- Make ownership, support, and publication expectations explicit.
- Do not assume repositories created from this template are commercially supported.
